summary: Add nutrition values per OMAD V04 ingredient
description: Expose source-modelled nutrition contribution for every product rather than only profile totals. Add generated per-item macro/salt values and a responsive ingredient nutrition table with selected micronutrients and evidence provenance.
acceptance: Every listed ingredient shows used amount, kcal, protein, carbs, fat, fibre and salt; expandable per-item cards expose selected vitamin/mineral contributions and evidence; profiles still calculate from the same generated values.
verification: python3 scripts/omad-v04-nutrition.py --check && npm test && npm run check && npm run check:seo && git diff --check

evidence.summary: All 11 ingredients now expose exact-used-portion kcal, protein, carbs, fat, fibre, salt and cost; expandable cards expose Vitamin A/C/D, folate, calcium, iron, potassium, choline and EPA+DHA with source evidence; 55 tests, 140-page site check and SEO green; browser rendered 11 rows/11 details with no page overflow.
